ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Continued To Nov-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Yongue for Paula Bibbs (Administrator).

Mr. Yongue provided an endorsed copy of a Status Report that was filed this morning. Mr. Yongue also stated that all of the art work was sheduled for auction but not all sold, that another auction is set for the middle of October and that the Administrator is trying to sell some items privately. Status on the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to November 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-23-2012 Continued To Jul-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Young for Paula Bibbs (Administrator).

Mr. Yongue stated that the art work had been appraised, that some of it had been distributed and that the last pieces will be sold on May 21, 2012. Status of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to July 23, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Wald for and with Paula Bibbs.

The Court stated that it received an update to the status report. Ms. Wald stated that they were confused as to what if anything Marie Matthews should receive, that they did not know what to do, that they gave her notice and they may need to file a petition for instructions. The Court granted the request for more time to file the Petition for Final Distribution and permits the estate to remain open until January of 2012 (order for the same to be signed).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Continued To Apr-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paula Bibbs (Administrator) appeared without Counsel.

Ms. Bibbs stated that Counsel thought the hearing was on for tomorrow and that Counsel requested a continuance or that the Court allow Ms. Bibbs to report status. The accounting/status report was continued to April 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Continued To Apr-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Wald for and with Susan Knutson (Petitioner).

Ms. Wald stated that there was no objection. The Court granted the petition appointing Paula Bibbs as the Administrator of the Estate of Patricia Carr Lamerdin without Independent Administration of Estate powers as it was not requested (signing the order for the same in open court). A bond in the amount of $500,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
